title: Measure personal-ledger performance
preconditions: Release binary and production SQLite settings with three accounts, 100000 active transactions, two pools, representative categories, evidence, reconciliation, attribution, correction and relationship history, and supported filters.
steps: Warm according to the benchmark protocol; measure thirty actuals first-page plus full grouped totals, reconciliation-candidate projections, completed-scope coverage projections, and ordinary single-entity writes; report p50, p95, environment, and correctness.
expected: Actuals, reconciliation-candidate, and coverage projections complete below 2 seconds p95; ordinary writes below 1 second p95; exact membership and grouped results remain correct.
